_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in correcting physical and technical problems that impact system/server performance.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-017 (AI, cosine: 0.562), OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.527).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.613). Shared vocabulary: [problems, system, technical]. DCWF-only terms [correcting, impact, performance, physical, server, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, application, causes, code, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.904, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in correcting physical and technical problems that impact system/server pe" and "Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layer" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.618 ≈ STS 0.613 (gap 0.004). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [problems, system, technical] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.2%. Shared tokens: [problems, system, technical]. DCWF-only: [correcting, impact, performance, physical, server, skill]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, application, causes, code, data].
